# TRACEROUTE(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  traceroute — print the route packets take to a network host

## SYNOPSIS
  traceroute <host>

## DESCRIPTION
Shows each hop along the network path between you and a target host.
Useful for understanding network topology.

## EXAMPLES
  traceroute nexus.corp
  traceroute chimera-control

## SEE ALSO
  ping, nmap, dig
